bun: Bun - fast all-in-one JavaScript runtime & package manager
ffmpeg: ffmpeg - multimedia framework for video/audio conversion and processing
flatpak: Flatpak - Linux application packaging and distribution system
general: Standalone commands that don't belong to a specific program
nginx: Nginx - web server and reverse proxy
pnpm: pnpm - fast, disk space efficient package manager
postgresql: PostgreSQL and PostgREST - database and REST API
python: Python & pip - programming language and package manager
redis: Redis - in-memory data structure store (CLI and commands)
supabase: Supabase CLI - local development and deployment
